content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Barbarian
description: Barbarian is a common Psycho class mod for Krieg, made by Bandit. It was introduced with Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep and drops from treasure chests found within that DLC areas.
notes:
Earlier versions of the Good variant could mistakenly slow reloads instead of speeding them up; this has since been corrected.

The mod is themed after tabletop Barbarians, focusing on light or no armour and close-range melee power, often backed by a rage-style boost.

special.description:
At level cap, the mod rolls one bonus from each of two pools.

Pool 1: Neutral +58.5% magazine size, Chaotic +58.5% fire rate, Lawful +58.5% accuracy.

Pool 2: Neutral +58.5% magazine size, Evil +58.5% critical hit damage, Good +58.5% reload speed.

True Neutral is the double magazine size prefix, giving +93.6% magazine size. The item card may show incorrect fire rate, reload speed and accuracy values.
